cards.narration: This is a short evidence update for MachLib package tooling.
cards.title: MachLib Evidence Tooling Update
cards.visual_direction: clean evidence card with concise package/status text

cards.narration: Four small pre-alpha packages are published and verified for early testing.
cards.title: Published packages
cards.visual_direction: clean evidence card with concise package/status text

cards.narration: MachLib and adjacent tools remain in a careful readiness and retry path.

cards.narration: The packet records tests, bounded validation, Twine checks, and repo artifact checks.
cards.title: What passed
cards.visual_direction: clean evidence card with concise package/status text

cards.narration: MachLib hit a PyPI rate limit, so the retry path pauses instead of forcing another upload.

cards.narration: This is evidence tooling, not a public proof claim or safety certification.
